agent_175ad5d9bfe5ce919271b539ea.bm_greeting: Good morning friend — it's Clara. Just my friendly check-in. How are you feeling today?

agent_8fbc66e7be3e0dde727f73a42b.bm_greeting: Hi, this is Clara from the US Senior Retirement Supply Administration. We’ve launched a new program to help you stay independent and safe at home. Could I take a moment to explain how it works?
